competitor_changes: built-in time tracking with weekly timesheet submission and manager approval
client portal with deliverable commenting, approval workflow, and status updates
resource capacity planning with utilisation heatmap
current_tool_status: No time-tracking built in; staff use a separate tool (ChronoLog) at £95/mo
Client portal view is read-only; clients cannot comment or approve deliverables in-app
Gantt chart view requires manual refresh
Slack integration was deprecated in TaskBridge v4.1; now requires Zapier workaround
